subject: martinlawfirm.com — quick fix for blank preview when shared on social
body:
Hi — I ran a free audit on martinlawfirm.com and the main thing that stood out: when someone shares your site on social media or iMessage, it shows up blank with no preview image or description. This is likely costing you rankings and new customers finding you online. Full report (no signup needed): https://sitelume.app/audit/?url=martinlawfirm.com

— Cyrus
